---
name: "📰 News Briefing"
about: "Monitor news on topics and get a structured briefing report"
title: "[News Briefing] "
labels: "gitgent, skill:news-briefing"
assignees: ""
---

### Topics

<!-- What topics should be monitored? One per line. -->
<!-- Good: "AI regulation in the EU", "OpenAI product launches", "venture capital trends in fintech" -->
<!-- Bad: "news" -->
- 

### Time Window

<!-- What period should the briefing cover? -->
<!-- Last 24 hours | Last 7 days | Last 30 days | Custom -->
Last 7 days

### Focus

<!-- Industry, geography, or source preferences -->
<!-- Example: "Focus on US and EU markets" or "Prioritize official announcements over opinion pieces" -->

### Depth

<!-- Headlines only (quick scan) | Standard (summaries + analysis) | Deep (full coverage + trends) -->
Standard

### Output Format

<!-- Markdown | Excel + Markdown | Both -->
Markdown

> **Tip**: Combine with a `schedule:daily` or `schedule:weekly` label for automated recurring briefings.
